focus: ES8311 Audio Codec I2C Initialization and Diagnostics
status: FIRMWARE FLASHED - AWAITING SERIAL MONITOR VERIFICATION

completed_tasks.description: Migrated from mixed I2C drivers to all-new I2C master driver API
completed_tasks.details: Changed all includes from driver/i2c.h to driver/i2c_master.h, created global i2c_master_bus_handle_t, fixed driver conflict error
Added i2c_check_line_levels() to measure SDA/SCL before init, i2c_bus_recover() with 9-clock pulse recovery + STOP condition, updated scanner with explicit timeouts

completed_tasks.description: Enabled I2C internal pull-ups for better bus stability
Fixed build script error level checking
completed_tasks.details: Corrected ERRORLEVEL/LASTEXITCODE capture in batch and PowerShell scripts to prevent false BUILD FAILED messages

completed_tasks.description: Simplified I2C scanner to reduce timeout spam
completed_tasks.details: Used i2c_master_probe() with 100ms timeout, suppressed NACK errors for non-existent addresses, clean scan output

completed_tasks.description: Added detailed logging and error handling for ES8311 initialization
completed_tasks.details: Replaced ESP_ERROR_CHECK with detailed error logging using esp_err_to_name(), added vTaskDelay yields after I2C operations

completed_tasks.description: Updated touch controller API to use new I2C driver
completed_tasks.details: Changed from esp_lcd_new_panel_io_i2c_v1() to esp_lcd_new_panel_io_i2c() with bus handle

completed_tasks.description: Successfully flashed diagnostic firmware to ESP32-C6 on COM4
completed_tasks.details: 268KB binary with I2C diagnostics, all peripherals temporarily disabled for isolated testing

completed_tasks.description: Created session status documentation and flash utility
completed_tasks.details: Comprehensive SESSION_STATUS.md and flash_monitor.bat for easy workflow

pending_tasks.description: Open serial monitor on COM4 @ 115200 baud to view I2C diagnostic output
pending_tasks.expected_output: I2C line levels, bus recovery status, device scan results

pending_tasks.description: Verify I2C bus finds 3 devices at addresses 0x18 (ES8311), 0x51 (RTC), 0x6B (IMU)
If I2C scan successful, re-enable audio system initialization
If I2C scan fails, debug with external 4.7kΩ pull-ups or lower bus speed
Test ES8311 full initialization through esp_codec_dev
Re-enable peripherals incrementally: LCD → Touch → WiFi → LVGL
Test audio functionality with test tone playback

main/opal_main.c.description: Added I2C diagnostics (line check, bus recovery, ES8311 test), created global i2c_master_bus_handle_t, temporarily disabled peripherals
critical_changes: Line level checking before I2C init
ES8311 initialization sequence with MCLK-first approach
Detailed error logging instead of ESP_ERROR_CHECK aborts

main/i2c_scanner.c.description: Updated to use new I2C master driver API with explicit timeouts
critical_changes: Uses i2c_master_probe() instead of device create/delete

main/audio_system.c.description: Pass bus_handle to codec library to trigger new I2C driver path
critical_changes: Ensures codec library uses new I2C driver

main/hardware_config.h.description: Changed I2C driver include to new API

build_lvgl.bat.description: Fixed ERRORLEVEL capture for accurate build result reporting

build_lvgl.ps1.description: Fixed LASTEXITCODE capture for accurate build result reporting

flash_monitor.bat.description: Created new utility script for easy flashing and monitoring

issues.description: I2C driver conflict: CONFLICT! driver_ng is not allowed to be used with this old driver
issues.resolution: Migrated entirely to new I2C master driver (commit 8a714a0)
issues.root_cause: esp_codec_dev library conditionally uses old driver if bus_handle is NULL

issues.description: Build script false BUILD FAILED messages
issues.resolution: Capture ERRORLEVEL/LASTEXITCODE immediately after build command (commit ee1d013)
issues.root_cause: Subsequent echo commands overwrite error level before check

issues.description: I2C scanner timeout spam (hundreds of timeout errors)
issues.resolution: Use i2c_master_probe() with 100ms timeout, suppress non-existent address errors (commit b0a169a)

issues.description: COM3 port busy during flash attempts
issues.resolution: Device actually on COM4, flashed successfully

issues.description: I2C bus stuck or no devices found
issues.resolution: Added line level check and bus recovery, enabled internal pull-ups
issues.next_action: Verify via serial monitor that bus recovery succeeds and devices are found

issues.description: Serial monitor access from bash/WSL environment
issues.resolution: User must open monitor from Windows CMD
issues.root_cause: PermissionError(13) on COM ports from MSys/Git Bash

key_findings: Successfully resolved I2C driver conflict by migrating to all-new I2C master driver API. Implemented comprehensive diagnostics including line level checking and bus recovery. Firmware flashed successfully to COM4. Critical next step is verifying I2C bus diagnostics via serial monitor to confirm 3 devices are found at 0x18, 0x51, 0x6B. ES8311 initialization sequence requires MCLK running before I2C access, achieved by enabling I2S TX channel first.
next_steps: 1. Open serial monitor on COM4 @ 115200 baud (idf.py -p COM4 monitor). 2. Verify I2C diagnostic output shows SDA=1 SCL=1, 0 clock pulses, and 3 devices found. 3. If successful, re-enable audio system initialization by uncommenting audio_system_init() in app_main(). 4. If failed, debug with external pull-ups or lower bus speed. 5. Incrementally re-enable other peripherals (LCD, touch, WiFi, LVGL). 6. Test audio functionality with test tone.

i2c_driver_api.critical_rule: DO NOT MIX old and new I2C drivers - esp_codec_dev will auto-select based on bus_handle being NULL or not
i2c_driver_api.new_driver_usage: Pass non-NULL bus_handle to audio_codec_i2c_cfg_t to trigger new driver path

es8311_init_sequence.step1: Enable I2S TX channel → MCLK output starts on GPIO 19
es8311_init_sequence.step3: Drive GPIO 13 (CE) HIGH to release codec from reset
es8311_init_sequence.step9: Verify: read reg 0x01 to confirm codec responding

technical_notes.task_watchdog: vTaskDelay yields prevent WDT timeouts, increased to 10s temporarily

git_commits.message: feat: Add comprehensive I2C bus diagnostics and recovery
feat: Enable I2C internal pull-ups for better bus stability
fix: Correct error level checking in build scripts
feat: Simplify I2C scanner to reduce timeout spam
feat: Migrate to all-new I2C master driver for ES8311
feat: Add detailed logging and error handling for ES8311 init
fix: Update touch controller API and add I2C diagnostic logging
docs: Add session status document and flash utility script

resume_instructions: Read SESSION_STATUS.md for complete context. Open serial monitor on COM4 to view I2C diagnostic output. Based on device scan results, either re-enable audio system (if 3 devices found) or debug I2C bus (if 0 devices found). Firmware is already flashed and ready for testing.
